Article Title: T20 World Cup 2026 Prize Money: How Much Will The Winner, Runners-Up, and semi-finalists Earn?
Article Text:
India's Axar Patel and teammates celebrate the wicket of New Zealand's Finn Allen (ANI Photo)

Extra trains and poojas: How India is preparing for T20 World Cup final

India national cricket team not only lifted the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 trophy but also secured a massive financial reward after defeating New Zealand national cricket team in the final in Ahmedabad.The champions will take home $3 million, which translates to approximately INR 27.48 crore, from the tournament’s prize pool. The runners up, New Zealand, will receive $1.6 million, around INR 14.65 crore.The International Cricket Council allocated the prize money across all teams participating in the tournament, with the total pool amounting to roughly INR 120 crore. The distribution is based on how far each team progressed in the competition.The two losing semi finalists, South Africa national cricket team and England national cricket team , will each receive $790,000, which is about INR 7.24 crore.Teams that reached the Super 8 stage but failed to qualify for the semi finals will earn $380,000 each, approximately INR 3.48 crore. Meanwhile, every team that participated in the group stage is guaranteed a payout of $250,000, equivalent to around INR 2.29 crore.India’s triumph in the final was built on a dominant performance with both bat and ball.Sanju Samson led the charge with a blistering 89 off 46 balls, helping India post a massive 255 for five in the summit clash at the Narendra Modi Stadium.In response, New Zealand were bowled out for 159 as India sealed a comfortable victory to become T20 World Cup champions. Jasprit Bumrah starred with four wickets for 15 runs, while Axar Patel picked up three wickets to complete a dominant performance.
Article Summary: Champions will take home $3 million, which translates to approximately inr 27.48 crore. The runners up, new zealand, will receive $1.6 million, around inr 14.65 crore. Every team that participated in the group stage is guaranteed a payout of $250,000, equivalent to about inr 2.29 crore.

Article Title: ICC Men’s T20 World Cup Winners List (2007–2026): Full list of tournament champions and runners-up
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

Extra trains and poojas: How India is preparing for T20 World Cup final

Here's full list of T20 World Cup winners and runners up from 2007 to 2026

Year Winner Runner Up 2007 India Pakistan 2009 Pakistan Sri Lanka 2010 England Australia 2012 West Indies Sri Lanka 2014 Sri Lanka India 2016 West Indies England 2021 Australia New Zealand 2022 England Pakistan 2024 India South Africa 2026 India New Zealand

India defended their title in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup after defeating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad on Sunday, following a record total in the first innings.India posted 255 for five after strong contributions from Sanju Samson (89), Abhishek Sharma (52) and Ishan Kishan (54). The total is the highest ever scored in a T20 World Cup final. With the win, India also became the first side to defend the T20 World Cup title.Chasing 256, New Zealand lost early wickets while trying to increase the scoring rate.Finn Allen (9) and Glenn Phillips (5) were dismissed early, leaving the side under pressure.India’s bowlers then took control. Axar Patel returned figures of 3 for 27 and Jasprit Bumrah finished with 4 for 15.After the dismissal of Tim Seifert, who scored 52 from 26 balls, the result was largely decided.Earlier, after being asked to bat first, Samson and Abhishek attacked from the start against the New Zealand bowlers.The pair added 98 runs for the first wicket in 7.1 overs, laying the platform for a high total.India crossed the 200-run mark in the 15th over.New Zealand slowed the scoring when James Neesham dismissed Samson, Kishan and captain Suryakumar Yadav (0) within six deliveries in the 16th over.Hardik Pandya made 18 before getting out, while Shivam Dube remained unbeaten on 26 and scored 24 runs in the final over bowled by Neesham.India added 52 runs in the last five overs.
Article Summary: India beat new zealand by 96 runs in the icc men's t20 world cup final. India posted a record total of 255 for five in their first innings. Sanju samson (89), abhishek sharma (52) and ishan kishan (54) contributed to the total.

Article Title: Novak Djokovic net worth vs his $186 million prize money: How much the tennis legend has actually earned over the years
Article Text:
A look at Novak Djokovic's $186 million prize money and off-court earnings.Image via: Getty

From breakthrough to the greatest of all time conversation







There are rich athletes, and then there is Novak Djokovic . Over nearly two decades of professional tennis, the Serbian star has done something no player in the history of the sport has managed. He has earned more than $186 million in prize money from tournaments alone. That number is staggering on its own. But it is really just the starting point when you look at the full picture of what Djokovic has built across his career. He turned professional in 2003 and spent his early years trying to find his footing in a sport that was very firmly owned by two people: Roger Federer and Rafael Nadal . Breaking into that conversation was never going to be easy. But in 2008, things shifted. Djokovic walked onto the court at the Australian Open and defeated Jo-Wilfried Tsonga in the final to claim his first Grand Slam title.It was the moment that told the rest of the tour that a third force had arrived and he was not going anywhere.What followed that 2008 win was one of the most sustained periods of dominance any sport has witnessed. Djokovic went on to win titles at all four Grand Slams: the Australian Open, Wimbledon, the French Open, and the US Open. He did it across different surfaces, in different conditions, against different generations of opponents.His ability to stay at or near the top of the rankings for so long is what separates him from almost everyone else who has ever played the game.Grand Slams pay the biggest prize money in tennis, and Djokovic has consistently gone deep in them year after year. Stack that on top of his ATP Masters titles and his earnings from smaller events, and you start to understand how the $186 million figure got so large. But tournament prize money is only part of the story. Like any global sports icon, Djokovic has built a significant income stream through endorsements. His most visible partnership is with Lacoste, which has been his clothing sponsor for years. He has also maintained long relationships with Head, Asics, and Hublot. These are brands that pay serious money to have their name attached to one of the most recognisable athletes on the planet.Away from tennis, Djokovic has put his name and resources behind causes and ventures that matter to him. The Novak Djokovic Foundation runs education programmes for children in Serbia, a project he has spoken about with genuine passion over the years. He has also invested in businesses connected to health, wellness, and hospitality. These are areas that align closely with his well-documented approach to looking after his body and his lifestyle.When you add it all up, the prize money, the sponsorship deals, and the business investments, his net worth is estimated to sit well above $220 million. And with Djokovic still competing at the highest level and still attracting major brands, that number has every chance of climbing further before he finally calls it a day.
Article Summary: Novak djokovic has earned more than $186 million in prize money. The serbian star has won four grand slams in his career. He has also made a fortune through sponsorship deals. His net worth is estimated to sit well above $220 million.

Article Title: Joao Fonseca issues confident message before blockbuster Indian Wells clash with World No. 2 Jannik Sinner
Article Text:
Joao Fonseca and Jannik Sinner (Image Via Getty)

Joao Fonseca sends confident message before first clash with Jannik Sinner at Indian Wells





Brazilian teenager Joao Fonseca is stepping into one of the biggest matches of his young career. The 19-year-old will face World No. 2 Jannik Sinner for the first time when they meet in the fourth round of the 2026 BNP Paribas Open in Indian Wells, California. Even though Sinner is a four-time Grand Slam champion and one of the most feared players on the ATP Tour, Fonseca does not look intimidated. Instead, the rising star sounds excited and ready for the challenge. After his third-round win, Fonseca openly said he wants to test his level against one of the best players in the world.The young Brazilian has already surprised many people at Indian Wells this week. Entering the tournament without a seed, he knocked out two seeded players on his way to the fourth round.First, he defeated Karen Khachanov, and then he produced a dominant performance against Tommy Paul. That win set up a high-profile showdown with Sinner, one of the most consistent players on tour over the past few seasons.Joao Fonseca’s performance in the third round caught plenty of attention. Playing against American star Tommy Paul, the teenager looked calm and aggressive from the first point. Paul struggled to deal with Fonseca’s powerful groundstrokes, and the match ended quickly with a 6-2, 6-3 victory for the Brazilian.After the win, Fonseca spoke about the opportunity to play against Jannik Sinner and explained why the match means so much to him.He said: “I’m just very happy the way that I played today and to have the opportunity to play with the, I mean, ex-top 1 and then now actual top 2. To see how my level is, where my game is and what I can achieve.”Fonseca also admitted that players around the world closely watch Sinner and current World No. 1 Carlos Alcaraz, because both stars have dominated many tournaments in recent years.He explained: “The players watch a lot Carlos and Jannik playing a lot of finals and a lot of epic matches. Both are in another level. Right now they’re playing such an amazing tennis and achieving, I mean, they’re almost winning every tournament.”Still, the Brazilian teenager made it clear that he will step onto the court believing he can win.Fonseca said: “I’m gonna enjoy playing out there. I’m gonna, I mean, try of course to win.”Interestingly, Jannik Sinner has spoken highly of Fonseca in the past. During the 2025 Italian Open in Rome, the Italian star recalled hitting with the young player earlier in his career and praised his talent.Sinner said: “João has incredible talent. I played with him a few years ago. These types of players are special, you can feel it right away. I wish him the best; he is a good person. Young, but already mature, both physically and mentally.”The winner of this fourth-round match at the 2026 BNP Paribas Open will move into the quarterfinals, where they will face either Learner Tien or Alejandro Davidovich Fokina.
Article Summary: Joao fonseca will play jannik sinner in the fourth round of the 2026 bnp paribas open. The 19-year-old beat tommy paul 6-2, 6-3 in the third round. Sinner is a four-time grand slam champion and one of the most feared players on the atp tour.

Article Title: Did Akshay Bhatia break golf’s anchoring rule at the Arnold Palmer Invitational? What really happened at Bay Hill
Article Text:
Did Akshay Bhatia break golf’s anchoring rule at the Arnold Palmer Invitational? What really happened at Bay Hill

Fans accused Akshay Bhatia of cheating at the Arnold Palmer Invitational



Akshay Bhatia discusses playing a long putter at the Arnold Palmer Invitational





Akshay Bhatia was reportedly accused by a fan of anchoring a putt at the 2026 Arnold Palmer Invitational. In a playoff, the American defeated Daniel Berger to win the PGA Tour event. A golf fan named Lord BLT posted a video of the American golfer, showing a peek of his shot on the playoff hole, and was accused of cheating in the game in the caption.The fan wrote, "He also cheated. But who cares? He won."However, anchoring in golf is not permitted. Some spectators accused him of cheating in the game; meanwhile, others defended him, a fan wrote. "His thumb is blocking, so it’s not officially anchoring."In golf, "anchoring of the club" is covered by Rule 14-1b. According to a rule, a player must not “anchor the club” either “directly” or at an “anchor point.” This is what the rule says about “directly” and “anchor point.”"The club is anchored “directly” when the player intentionally holds the club or a gripping hand in contact with any part of his body, except that the player may hold the club or a gripping hand against a hand or forearm."An 'anchor point' exists when the player intentionally holds a forearm in contact with any part of his body to establish a gripping hand as a stable point around which the other hand may swing the club."Anchoring in the game can lead to a two-stroke penalty in stroke format, and in match format, the player may lose the hole.Akshay Bhatia was questioned about using a long putter during the press conference following the round. A reporter asked about the long putter he had been using for some time."I've been doing the same thing for a long time," Bhatia said. "And the funny thing is, this week I felt like Joe, and I do this drill where I throw a Chapstick around and do Aimpoint stuff and try to guess the percentage of slope. And I was really dialed in on Tuesday. But I think I just have more awareness of what it takes out here to make putts. Because I struggled with that last year."My putter slides on these greens, and so I think I figured that out. Figured out a lot of things this week with my coach on just how to attack the golf course. And my speed was great. I had a couple of 3-pointers, but that's going to happen here," he added.Akshay Bhatia opened the 2026 Arnold Palmer Invitational with a round score of 70. He then added a second round of 66, followed by the last two rounds, which were 68 and 69.After the fourth round, he jumped one spot on the leaderboard and settled into a tie for the lead at 15 under with Berger. He finally secured the title by making a par in the playoff. Akshay Bhatia received $4 million in prize money from his victory, along with 700 FedEx Cup points.
Article Summary: Golf fan accused akshay bhatia of anchoring a putt at the 2026 arnold palmer invitational. In golf, "anchoring of the club" is covered by rule 14-1b. Anchoring in the game can lead to a two-stroke penalty in stroke format.

Article Title: NFL Trade News: Atlanta Falcons linked to $124M Miami Dolphins quarterback
Article Text:
NFL Trade News: Atlanta Falcons linked to $124M Miami Dolphins quarterback (Image via Getty: Atlanta Falcons logo and Miami Dolphins logo)

Falcons projected QB Tua Tagovailoa cost Miami $99M in dead money

Watch for Dolphins QB Tua Tagovailoa in Atlanta Falcons

Tua Tagovailoa could become a bridge quarterback for Michael Penix Jr in Atlanta

Kevin Stefanski may decide who the starting quarterback will be for the Atlanta Falcons







ESPN’s Marcel Louis-Jacques reports the Miami Dolphins will release their longstanding quarterback, Tua Tagovailoa , after the start of the new league year [March 11 at 4:00 PM ET]. The move will result in an NFL record $99M in dead money against the salary cap.According to Spotrac, the 28-year-old signal caller signed a four-year contract worth $212M with Miami in 2024, which included a $42M signing bonus and $167M in guaranteed money. For the 2026 season, the quarterback was projected to earn a base salary of $39M, a $15M signing bonus, and a $250,000 workout bonus, while carrying a cap hit of $56M and a dead cap value of $99M. As of this publication, his career earnings are $124M.This blockbuster move leaves Tagovailoa with three landing spots: the Atlanta Falcons, the Minnesota Vikings, and the New York Jets. For now, it’s the QB room with the expected official release of $100M backup Kirk Cousins.A week before Tagovailoa’s blockbuster release announcement, ESPN’s Dan Graziano predicted that it would happen. Miami tried to negotiate trade talks with other NFL teams, but Graziano was skeptical.He was expecting the Dolphins to release the QB by the third day of the league year [when $3M of his 2027 salary would be fully guaranteed].He predicted Miami would designate him as a post-June 1 release to help defray $99.2M in dead money. They released him two days before the start of the league year. This move cost Miami an NFL-record $99.2M in dead money.The Dolphins told NFL Insider Adam Schefter that the signal-caller’s release would be designated post-June 1, giving the franchise the opportunity to split the dead money over two years: $67.4M dead hit in 2026 and $31.8M dead hit in 2027.Now that he’s been released two days prior. This gives the Atlanta Falcons a green signal in case they want to sign him as backup.ESPN’s Jeremy Fowler’s notebook contains, “Something an NFL head coach said to me, unsolicited: Watch for Tua in Atlanta.” The Falcons are set to release Kirk Cousins on the first day of the new league year, GM Ian Cunningham confirmed in February at the NFL Combine. Cousins is now an unrestricted free agent.Anyhow, this leaves an empty space for a quarterback looking to revamp his image after a 15-interceptions season.Having played for the same team for six seasons, he carries extensive experience. If he brings his lessons to a team needing to revamp its 8-9 record, their shared goals could turn the 2026 season into a year of redemption.But what would be his role there?Heavy Sports’ Shane Shoemaker reports Atlanta could be looking for a backup to Michael Penix Jr. or an eventual replacement, even if that comes on a short-term deal. Penix is currently rehabbing from ACL surgery.As per his recovery timeline, the 25-year-old Indiana alumnus is projected to return by Week 1 of the 2026 season. If he is not cleared, the Dolphins QB can serve as a bridge quarterback and play the first few games in place of Penix, then, when the 25 YO signal caller is cleared, he can step in and take over the starter QB’s role.CBS Sports’ John Breech reports that Penix is left-handed and so is Tagovailoa. So, bringing in another left-hander for a QB competition would be a plus for the Falcons. They would not have to make any major changes on the offensive side.Atlanta’s President of Football, Matt Ryan, told CBS Sports that new head coach Kevin Stefanski, who coached the Cleveland Browns in 2025, would be choosing the starting quarterback for 2026.“Kevin’s responsibility is to be the head coach of the football team, and he’s going to let you know who our starters are and who our starters are not. It’s not my place to go in there,” Ryan said during Super Bowl week. So, if they sign Tagovailoa, Stefanski may have to decide between Penix and the Miami QB.The Alabama alumnus recorded 2,660 passing yards, 20 touchdowns, and 15 interceptions in the 2025 season. He has one Pro Bowl selection [2023].What remains to be seen is whether the Falcons sign him...
Article Summary: Miami dolphins will release their longstanding quarterback, tua tagovailoa, after the start of the new league year. The move will result in an nfl record $99m in dead money against the salary cap. Atlanta falcons could be looking for a backup to michael penix jr. or an eventual replacement, even if that comes on a short-term deal.

Article Title: Did Emmanuel Acho just predict Travis Kelce's future? The tight end's 2026 decision gave that debate a clear ending
Article Text:
Travis Kelce decides to stay on with the Chiefs (Image via Getty)

Emmanuel Acho’s ‘Chiefs or retire’ stance looked blunt, but it matched the moment

Article Title: How to pronounce Alysa Liu’s name? Olympic gold medalist Alysa Liu finally reveals correct way after Milano Cortina Winter Olympics fame
Article Text:
How to pronounce Alysa Liu’s name? Olympic gold medalist Alysa Liu finally reveals correct way after Milano Cortina Winter Olympics fame (Image via Getty)

Alysa Liu explains correct pronunciation of her name after defeating Kaori Sakamoto and Ami Nakai at Milano Cortina Winter Olympics





Alysa Liu has been one of the most talked-about athletes after her big moment at the Milano-Cortina Winter Olympics. The 20-year-old American figure skater won two gold medals and suddenly found herself everywhere, on TV shows, social media, and in sports headlines around the world. But while people were celebrating her Olympic success, there was one small detail almost everyone kept getting wrong: how to say her name. In a recent interview with Newsweek, Alysa Liu shared that most fans and even media outlets have been pronouncing her last name incorrectly for years. She explained that while she does not get upset about it, the real pronunciation is actually different from what many people say.Alysa Liu made history at the Milano-Cortina Games by becoming the first American woman in 24 years to win the Olympic gold medal in women’s singles figure skating. Her strong performances helped Team USA win the team event as well. Along the way, she defeated top Japanese skaters Kaori Sakamoto and Ami Nakai, which made her victory even more memorable. Now, as fans continue to celebrate her Olympic success, Alysa Liu has decided to finally explain the correct way to say her name.During the interview with Newsweek, Alysa Liu calmly explained how her name should really sound.“Technically, this is how my family says my name: ‘Ah-Lee-sa Lee-Oh,’” Liu said.However, she also admitted that people around the world usually say it differently.“‘Ah-Li-sa’ is how my friends call me. And that’s how the world calls me,” she said.The biggest confusion comes with her last name. Many people say “Lee-Ooh” or even “Lu.” Liu said she understands why people get confused and does not expect everyone to say it perfectly.“And then my last name, a lot of people call me ‘Lee-Ooh’ or ‘Lu,’” Liu explained.“I personally don’t care. It can be hard to pronounce. I don’t expect people to know how to say that. But technically my name is ‘Ah-Lee-Sa Lee-Oh.’”While Liu has been enjoying the spotlight after the Olympics, she also had an uncomfortable moment soon after returning home. She shared the experience on Instagram, explaining that a group of fans crowded her at the airport.“So I land at the airport, and there’s a crowd waiting at the exit with cameras and things for me to sign,” she wrote.“All up in my personal space. Someone chased me to my car bruh. Please do not do that to me.”Despite the excitement around her Olympic success, Liu has decided not to compete in the upcoming World Figure Skating Championships scheduled in Prague later this month. Her name is no longer listed on the official website of the International Skating Union, though no reason for the withdrawal has been confirmed.Earlier, actor Daniel Radcliffe even praised Liu during her appearance on The Today Show, showing how widely her Olympic performance has been noticed. For now, Alysa Liu remains one of the biggest stars to come out of the Milano-Cortina Games, and fans finally know how to say her name correctly.
Article Summary: Alysa liu became the first american woman in 24 years to win the olympic gold medal in women’s singles figure skating. She also helped team usa win the team event at the milano-cortina winter olympics. The 20-year-old has decided not to compete in the upcoming world figure skating championships scheduled in prague.

Article Title: Meet new F1 WAG Lauren Fitzsimmons: Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend who supported him at his Red Bull debut at Australian Grand Prix
Article Text:
Isack Hadjar's girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons cheered him on at the Australian Grand Prix. (Image credit: Instagram)

Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons helped a fan at the Australian Grand Prix



Who is Isack Hadjar’s blonde girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons?







Isack Hadjar made his Red Bull debut at the Australian Grand Prix in Melbourne on Sunday. Cheering for him from the paddock was his girlfriend, Lauren Fitzsimmons. The French driver proved he was worthy of a Red Bull seat alongside Max Verstappen by delivering an impressive performance in qualifying, where he finished third. However, his unfortunate crash in the final race ended his chances of converting it into a decent finish. Naturally, Fitzsimmons’ presence at the Albert Park Circuit must have been comforting for the driver as she turned up in blue as his biggest cheerleader.Taking to Instagram, Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons shared pictures of herself posing at the Albert Park Circuit on Sunday. Comfortably dressed in a sky-blue shirt and matching shorts, Fitzsimmons made sure she was there to cheer for Hadjar on his Red Bull debut.“The name’s Loz, missed u aus <33,” she wrote in the caption along with a shaking-head emoji.Hadjar was quick to drop a like on her pictures. Reacting to the post, a fan revealed how she helped them get an autograph from Hadjar. “Thank you so much for helping Isack sign my cap. You are both so nice,” the fan wrote.Many others commented, “She’s so gorgeous”, while some called her “beautiful” in the comments section.Hadjar, however, called it a “sh*t race” because his Red Bull debut ended in a crash despite what he had achieved in qualifying the day before.Sharing a few pictures from the weekend on Instagram, the 21-year-old wrote, “Might’ve been a sh!t race, but I got to see @alexvolkanovski! Lots of positives from that weekend, we get to try again in China.”Lauren Fitzsimmons has a solid presence online, with 39.7K followers and boyfriend Isack Hadjar being one of them. After Hadjar’s promotion from Racing Bulls as a replacement for Yuki Tsunoda at Red Bull, her popularity could rise as she becomes one of the newest WAGs on the F1 circuit. She appears to be a model who travels between Ontario and London, and her Instagram profile reflects her love for travel, food, fun, and friends.According to The Sun, the two started dating around the Monaco Grand Prix, held in May last year. If one looks deeper into her Instagram, rare glimpses of Hadjar can be found inside her photo dumps. The couple were also vacationing together during the pre-season break. On 29 January, Lauren shared several snaps from her holidays in Canada and Cannes, and one picture showed Hadjar shyly posing beside his mean machine.Hadjar had shared a subtle hint of her inside the photo dump around the New Year, which had yacht rides, snowy vacations, and other moments from their time together.Fans may see more of the new WAG this season as Isack Hadjar gears up for the next race in Shanghai, the Chinese Grand Prix. It will be followed by the Japanese Grand Prix two weeks after the Round 2 race.Also read: “Want proper F1 on steroids”: Max Verstappen urges FIA changes; Oliver Bearman says racing at Australian GP felt like Formula E
Article Summary: Isack hadjar made his red bull debut at the australian grand prix on sunday. Cheering for him from the paddock was his girlfriend, lauren fitzsimmons. The two started dating around the monaco grand prix in may last year. She appears to be a model who travels between ontario and london.

Article Title: Bad Bunny, Taylor Swift and Lady Gaga: Tennis stars Alexandra Eala and Iga Swiatek pick their dream celebrity guests at matches
Article Text:
Alexandra Eala and Iga Swiatek reveal dream celebrity guests.Image via: Getty

From Josh Allen to Zendaya and Rihanna: WTA stars reveal their starry wishlist







Alexandra Eala’s breakout run at Indian Wells is already one of the most talked-about stories in tennis this week. The Filipina teenager has powered into the round of 16 in her debut appearance at the prestigious WTA Tour event, drawing loud support from fans in California along the way. With every match, the crowds around her court seem to grow bigger, a sign of just how she is becoming one of the sport’s most exciting young personalities.While the results on court have grabbed headlines, Eala recently sparked a different kind of conversation off the court. In a fun social media challenge shared on Instagram, several WTA players were asked to name three celebrities they would love to see watching them play. The reaction went viral among tennis fans, offering a glimpse into the personalities and pop culture interests of some of the tour’s biggest stars. For Eala, the dream guest list includes two global icons and one rising music star.When it was her turn to answer the question on Instagram, Eala revealed that she would love to see a fellow Filipino legend cheering from the stands. “I would pick Manny Pacquiao, Bad Bunny , and I would pick Olivia Dean.” The responses from other players on the WTA Tour were just as interesting.World No. 1 Iga Swiatek went with a trio of huge names from music and Hollywood. “Taylor Swift, Lady Gaga. Emma Stone.” Jessica Pegula mixed sports with pop culture when she shared her picks. “Well I’ll say Josh Allen because that would be cool and there’s a connection there. “Maybe like Sidney Crosby, hockey player, I was pretty obsessed with him a while ago. And then maybe I’d throw in like Joe Jonas or something, because I’m a big Jonas Brothers fan.”Australian Open champion Elena Rybakina also joined in, mentioning someone she had recently met. “I just met Lily Collins yesterday, so it would be nice to see her and maybe even her dad. Zendaya, I think she was here, but she didn’t get to see my match, so hopefully she could come. Yeah, Daniel Radcliffe.”Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff also shared their celebrity wish lists. Sabalenka said, “Anna Wintour, Lily Collins, of course, and Hailey Bieber,” while Gauff kept it simple with three of the biggest stars in entertainment: “Rihanna, Beyonce and Zendaya.”Some of the younger names on tour joined the challenge as well. Teenage star Mirra Andreeva revealed that one legendary tennis figure would always make her list. “I would probably go for Ryan Gosling. I would go for Emma Stone, and let’s choose Roger [Federer], he’s always one of the celebrities that I would pick.”For WTA Tour fans, moments like these keep the conversation going off the court. And if stars like Pacquiao, Swift or Federer ever showed up to watch, it would easily become another viral moment.
Article Summary: Alexandra eala and iga swiatek reveal dream celebrity guests. Wta players were asked to name three celebrities they would love to see watching them play. The reaction went viral among tennis fans, offering a glimpse into the personalities and pop culture interests of some of the tour's biggest stars.

Article Title: Jarryd Dale Error: Why Team Australia missed World Baseball Classic quarterfinals after South Korea win as controversial tiebreaker rules
Article Text:
Why Team Australia missed World Baseball Classic quarterfinals after South Korea win as controversial tiebreaker rules (Image via Getty Images)

Jarryd Dale error and Do Yeong Kim play explain how South Korea won the Pool C tiebreaker over Australia





South Korea and Australia played a tense World Baseball Classic game on Monday, and the result changed everything in Pool C. South Korea defeated Australia 7-2, which helped them reach the World Baseball Classic quarterfinals in Miami. But many fans were confused. Australia had already won two games in the pool stage, so people wondered why they were knocked out. The answer lies in the World Baseball Classic tiebreaker rules. After the game ended, South Korea, Australia, and Chinese Taipei all finished with the same 2-2 record in Pool C.When teams have identical records, the tournament does not simply look at total wins. Instead, it uses a set of statistical tiebreaker rules to decide which team advances. Because of those rules, South Korea moved on, while Australia and Chinese Taipei were eliminated. The game itself also had a dramatic moment late in the match that changed the final score and ultimately sealed Australia’s fate. According to tournament information shared by World Baseball Classic officials, the final run margin and defensive mistakes in the late innings played a huge role in determining who advanced.Before the game started, Australia actually had the best chance among the three teams. They entered the matchup with a 2-1 record, while South Korea was also 2-1 and Chinese Taipei had already finished 2-2. That meant the final game between Australia and South Korea would decide everything.In the simplest terms, Australia needed either a win or a smaller losing margin to qualify. If they beat South Korea, they would move directly to the quarterfinals. Even if they lost, some scorelines could still allow them to advance depending on the tiebreaker calculations.However, the 7-2 result favored South Korea, allowing them to win the tiebreaker among the three teams. The game itself was very tight at one point. South Korea built an early 5-0 lead, but Australia fought back. In the fifth inning, Robbie Glendinning hit a solo home run that reduced the gap. Later in the eighth inning, Travis Bazzana added an RBI single that made the score 6-2 and kept Australia within reach.Then came the moment that Australian fans will remember for a long time. With runners on base, Do Yeong Kim was walked and replaced by the fast Hae-Min Park as a pinch runner. South Korea captain Jung Hoo Lee hit a weak ground ball to Australian shortstop Jarryd Dale.It looked like a routine play. Dale only needed to throw the ball to second baseman Travis Bazzana to catch Park. But the throw went wrong. Park safely reached third base instead of being out. That mistake proved costly.Soon after, Hyun Min Ahn, the KBO Rookie of the Year, hit a sacrifice fly that allowed Park to score. The run pushed the score to 7-2, which gave South Korea the exact margin they needed to win the tiebreaker.Because of that final score, South Korea advanced to the quarterfinals in Miami, where they are expected to face the winner of Pool D, likely the Dominican Republic or Venezuela, according to tournament coverage from World Baseball Classic updates.Meanwhile, despite winning two games earlier in the tournament, Australia’s campaign ended in the pool stage.
Article Summary: South korea defeated australia 7-2 on monday to advance to the world baseball classic quarterfinals in miami. Australia had already won two games in the pool stage, so people wondered why they were knocked out. The answer lies in the world baseball classic tiebreaker rules.

Article Title: Did Rashan Gary’s goodbye post hint at a Packers trade? “Hacked” claim surfaces after viral message
Article Text:
Rashan Gary (Image Via Getty)

Rashan Gary’s social media post and Packers salary cap situation spark speculation





Green Bay Packers pass rusher Rashan Gary surprised fans on Friday when a goodbye message suddenly appeared on his social media accounts. The post, shared on Instagram and X, looked like a farewell note to the team and its supporters. Naturally, fans quickly started wondering if the defensive star was leaving the Packers before the 2026 NFL season. However, the situation soon took another turn. According to reports from Packers beat writers, the posts were later described as the result of Gary’s accounts being hacked.That explanation came after the message had already spread widely across social media. The timing of the situation also drew attention. The Packers had just managed to move under the NFL salary cap earlier this week, which means the team now has flexibility in how it handles several roster decisions this offseason. Because of that context, the unexpected message from Gary quickly became a major talking point among fans and NFL reporters.The message posted on Rashan Gary’s accounts sounded very much like a farewell to Green Bay. In the statement, the pass rusher reflected on the moment he joined the team in 2019 and thanked fans for their support.Gary wrote, “When I got the call in 2019, it was one of the greatest moments of my life, and it always will be. The opportunity to represent Green Bay and Packers Nation across the country and around the world is something I will never forget.”He continued by saying, “Like all chapters in life, this one has come to an end. I want to thank everyone who supported me and my family throughout the years. The love, the energy, and the memories mean more than words can explain.”The message ended with a confident note about his future. Gary added, “On to my next stop — nowhere near done yet. All 6’5”, 275… can’t wait.”Soon after the post went viral, several Packers reporters said the team’s understanding was that Gary’s accounts had been hacked. That explanation raised eyebrows for some observers because the post appeared on multiple platforms and even included a graphic.Meanwhile, the football side of the situation remains unchanged. Rashan Gary is still under contract with the Packers for the 2026 season and is scheduled to earn about $18 million in salary.According to ESPN reporter Adam Schefter, no official move has been made regarding Gary’s future. Schefter wrote, “Packers edge Rashan Gary has not been released at this time. No definitive action has been taken. All options still remain on the table, including a potential trade.”The Packers recently restructured safety Xavier McKinney’s contract, a move that helped the team get under the salary cap before the new league year begins on March 11. Because of that move, Green Bay does not need to make immediate roster decisions.General manager Brian Gutekunst has also said that players currently under contract for 2026 are expected to return for the season. For now, Gary remains part of that group while the team evaluates its next steps during the offseason.
Article Summary: Green bay packers pass rusher rashan gary surprised fans on friday when a goodbye message suddenly appeared on his social media accounts. The post, shared on instagram and x, looked like a farewell note to the team and its supporters. According to reports from packers beat writers, the posts were later described as the result of gary’s accounts being hacked.

Article Title: Lucas Di Grassi: Lucas Di Grassi calls for FIA modernisation after backlash to new F1 rules: “I want to see pure performance”
Article Text:
Lucas Di Grassi (Image credit: Instagram)

Lucas Di Grassi calls for FIA overhaul amid backlash to new F1 rules

What Lucas Di Grassi wants from the FIA





Formula E veteran Lucas Di Grassi has given his verdict on the new F1 rules as the Australian Grand Prix had several drivers including Max Verstappen and Lando Norris expressed their disappointment over the new F1 cars. The Lola Yamaha ABT driver has shortlisted the underlying issues he feels exist in the FIA and has called for a more modern approach to multiple formats to keep each format unique and different from one another.Lucas Di Grassi shared a video on Instagram and captioned it: “The sport could do better. We always have to strive for excellence.# #f1 #formula1 #fia #rules.”The Formula E veteran said in the video, “Just because I've seen so many negative comments about the new Formula 1 rules… The rules are decided by the FIA, both in sporting and technical terms. And you have smart and intelligent people within the FIA. But the way the structure is organized, the way the rules are decided, they aren't always aligned with the best interests of the promotional party. Parties like Formula One, Formula E, or WEC.“There's a bit of a disconnect between what the FIA decides and what the FIA wants, and what's needed for the sport, in my opinion, especially on the promotional side. Also, because it's a federation, there's no FIA ownership, so they shy away from a number of innovations and a number of different approaches and incentives that could be put in place to accelerate that innovation faster or to choose the right path, rules, or the technical and sporting rights, so that the sport could thrive in the right way.So you end up with some discrepancies, such as, for example, with the rules that F1 has now in 2026, or for example, it took more than seven, eight years to get involved in Formula 8 traffic in four-by-four,” he added.Further sharing what he wants to see from the FIA, Lucas Di Grassi said, “So there are many examples that I believe if they were better organized and if the instances and structure within the FIA were a little more modern, we would have achieved this much more quickly. Including making the championships, the feeder series and the lower-level championships, cheaper and more accessible. So, I hope we can change these structures, modernize the FIA, make better decisions that influence the sport in a much, much better way. ”Confirming his vision for F1 and other formats, he concluded, “And… Yes, I would like to see Formula 1 with pure performance, I would like to see Formula E with pure efficiency, I would like to see the WEC with road-relevant technologies, very discreet, different technologies, working side by side, but not cannibalizing each other, not with many innovations that used to happen in the past, when there was more freedom. Anyway, there are many things to do, but I hope this will be for the best of our sport.”Reacting to Di Grassi’s video, a fan wrote: “I've been thinking priorities are kind of twisted lately. Looks like number one peers to please are the investors, then the manufacturers, then the sponsors and lastly the audience.” Many others expressed they agreed with his point of view.Di Grassi still has ten days to go for the Madrid E-Prix, lined up from March 20-21. Its a new venue on the Formula E calender and a Rookie Test will also follow the E-Prix on March 22.Also read: Oliver Rowland fulfills promise to cheer for protege Arvid Lindblad at Australian GP, flies from Dubai to Melbourne amid Middle East tension
Article Summary: Lucas di grassi calls for fia overhaul amid backlash to new f1 rules. Lola yamaha abt driver has called for a more modern approach to multiple formats. Formula e veteran shared a video on instagram and captioned it: “the sport could do better”

Article Title: Top 5 richest tennis players in 2026: Roger Federer leads billion-dollar list with Serena Williams, Novak Djokovic and Rafael Nadal
Article Text:
Who are the richest tennis players in 2026? Find out.Image via: Getty

Roger Federer – Estimated net worth: $1.1 billion approximately



Serena Williams – Estimated net worth: $300-350 million approximately



Novak Djokovic – Estimated net worth: $240-250 million approximately



Rafael Nadal – Estimated net worth: $220 million approximately



Andy Murray – Estimated net worth: $160 million approximately







Tennis has always had a certain glamour to it. But the money flowing through the sport today is on a completely different level compared to even a decade ago. Grand Slam prize funds keep climbing, tournaments are paying out more than ever, and the biggest stars are signing sponsorship deals that can sometimes make their actual prize money look like small change. For the players who made it to the very top, the real wealth rarely came from tennis alone. It came from what they built around it. Smart brand partnerships, well-timed investments, and personal business ventures have helped a small group of players turn a great career into a genuinely life-changing fortune. Here are the five richest tennis players in 2026.Roger Federer is simply at the top when it comes to wealth. He earned more than $130 million in prize money during his playing career, which is a remarkable number on its own. But that is not what made him a billionaire. It was the empire he has built off the court. Rolex, Mercedes-Benz, Uniqlo — his endorsement list reads like a luxury brand directory. And then came his investment in Swiss sportswear company On, which turned out to be one of the shrewdest moves any athlete has ever made. Federer is the first tennis player in history to cross the billion-dollar mark according to Forbes, and it is hard to imagine anyone catching him any time soon.Serena Williams is widely considered the richest female tennis player who has ever lived, and the numbers back that up. She brought in nearly $95 million in prize money across her career according to Celebrity Net Worth, along with a collection of titles that will never be forgotten. But Serena has always had her eye on something bigger than tennis. Through Serena Ventures, she has backed dozens of companies across different industries. Add in her fashion work and her global endorsements, and her wealth has kept growing well after her playing days wound down.No player in tennis history has earned more prize money than Novak Djokovic. His total from tournaments alone sits at more than $186 million, a record that may stand for a very long time. Off the court, he has kept things equally busy. Partnerships with Lacoste, Head and Hublot have been consistent earners, and he has also put money into restaurants, wellness projects and other ventures that quietly keep adding to the total.Rafael Nadal built something rare — a career so respected that the brand essentially sold itself. His long partnerships with Nike and Kia brought in serious money alongside everything he earned on the court. But perhaps the most personal part of his financial story is the Rafa Nadal Academy in Mallorca, a project he clearly cares deeply about and one that has grown into one of the most respected training centres anywhere in the sport.Andy Murray tends to be the quietest name on this list, but his financial story is genuinely interesting. Three Grand Slam titles, solid endorsement deals with Under Armour and Jaguar, and then a pivot into technology startups and sports businesses that not many people saw coming. Murray has never been someone who courts attention off the court, but he has been building something real and it shows in the numbers.Most of these players have already stepped back from competing regularly, but their presence in the sport is still very much felt. And with prize money continuing to rise and sponsorship deals getting bigger every year, the current generation of players may eventually have a real shot at matching what these five built over their careers.
Article Summary: Roger federer is the first tennis player in history to cross the billion-dollar mark. Serena williams is widely considered the richest female tennis player who has ever lived. Novak djokovic has earned more prize money than any other player in tennis history.

Article Title: Rory Mcilroy: Rory McIlroy's net worth vs $200 million brand contract: How the brand deal boosted the golfer's net worth
Article Text:
Rory McIlroy's net worth vs $200 million brand contract? How the brand deal boosted the golfer's net worth

Rory McIlroy's $200 million Nike contract



Rory McIlroy’s Rejected LIV Golf Payday





Rory McIlroy is a Northern Ireland-born professional golfer. Rory McIlroy has been the world's top-ranked professional golfer for more than 100 weeks. Rory is a four-time major champion, winning the 2011 U.S. Open, 2012 PGA Championship, 2014 Open Championship, and 2014 Ryder Cup. Rory McIlroy's estimated net worth, according to Celebrity Net Worth , is $250 million.Rory is among the highest-paid athletes on the planet; he easily earns $40-50 million from tournament winnings but mostly from endorsements, including from brands like Nike, TaylorMade, and so on.Rory McIlroy, one of the most marketable athletes in the world for a long time, has attracted lucrative endorsement deals from international brands. In 2013, he reportedly signed a blockbuster endorsement deal with Nike valued between $100 million and $250 million.In 2017, that relationship was formalized and extended with a 10-year, $200 million contract. However, after Nike left the golf equipment business, McIlroy secured a $100 million contract with TaylorMade in 2017 to exclusively utilize its clubs, balls, and golf bag.Beyond Nike and TaylorMade, McIlroy has endorsed a wide range of other businesses in luxury goods, tech, finance, and clothing and apparel.He signed with Omega Watches as a brand ambassador and has appeared prominently in their international marketing campaigns.He partnered with JPMorgan Chase in the financial sector, particularly on the Chase Sapphire card brand. He has also promoted NBC Sports' GolfPass, a subscription service he helped develop, which combines golf instruction, tee-time booking, and streaming video. He has also received endorsements from UnitedHealth Group, Bose, and EA Sports, for which he was the cover athlete for the Rory McIlroy PGA Tour.Rory McIlroy has amassed over $104 million in official PGA Tour prize money, making him the second-highest earner in PGA Tour history after Tiger Woods. Rory McIlroy was one of the most expressive critics of LIV Golf and repeatedly declined offers to join the Saudi-backed league, despite top players making the move for massive paydays.According to multiple reports, McIlroy was reportedly offered a deal worth between $300 million and $500 million to leave the PGA Tour. The figures would have instantly placed him among the highest-paid athletes in history. There were rumors that he rejected a deal that included equity in LIV Golf plus a massive payday that brought the total value of the offer to $850+ million. He denied these claims. Despite tempting sums, McIlroy chose to stay loyal to the PGA Tour, citing moral concerns about the source of LIV's funding and his faith in the legacy and competitive integrity of the traditional tour.
Article Summary: Rory mcilroy's estimated net worth, according to celebrity net worth, is $250 million. He earns $40-50 million from tournament winnings but mostly from endorsements. He has signed endorsement deals with nike, taylormade, omega watches, and jpmorgan chase.

Article Title: Jarren Duran Net Worth: Jarren Duran's net worth vs his $7.7 million contract: How much the Boston Red Sox outfielder has earned in MLB
Article Text:
Jarren Duran net worth vs his $7.7 million contract: How much the Boston Red Sox outfielder has earned in MLB (Image via Getty Images)

Jarren Duran’s contract details, net worth growth and future Boston Red Sox contract predictions explained

Jarren Duran's breakout performance with Boston Red Sox raises his long term value





Jarren Duran is becoming one of the most talked about players on the Boston Red Sox roster. The speedy outfielder has turned into a key part of the team since his breakout season in 2024. Because of that rise, many fans are now asking two simple questions. How much money does Jarren Duran make today and what could his next contract look like in the future? For the 2026 MLB season, Jarren Duran is playing on a one year contract with the Boston Red Sox.The deal also includes performance bonuses based on plate appearances. While that salary is strong, Duran is still early in his earning years compared to many MLB veterans. His net worth is estimated to be in the low millions, mostly coming from his MLB salaries and performance bonuses. As Duran continues to produce for Boston, experts believe his next contracts could become much bigger in the coming years.Jarren Duran’s current contract situation with the Boston Red Sox is fairly straightforward. For the 2026 MLB season, the team agreed to a one year arbitration deal worth $7.7 million.The contract also includes performance bonuses tied to plate appearance milestones throughout the season.Those bonuses are considered achievable because Duran has proven he can handle a heavy workload. In recent seasons he recorded more than 700 plate appearances, showing he is capable of staying healthy and playing regularly across a full Major League Baseball schedule.Before agreeing to the 2026 deal, Duran earned about $3.85 million during the 2025 season. Combined with his earlier MLB salaries, those earnings make up most of his current wealth, which financial estimates suggest sits in the low millions of dollars.His ongoing success with the Boston Red Sox has directly contributed to Jarren Duran's increasing value as a professional baseball player. The fast outfielder has developed into one of the team's most consistent offensive players since his first breakout performance during the 2024 season.His base running ability, combined with his outfield defensive skills and his improving batting performance, enabled him to secure his position as a regular starter. Duran's ability to create defensive challenges for opposing teams has given the Boston Red Sox offense a new dimension to their attack.Major League Baseball players who demonstrate a combination of speed, defensive skills and dependable hitting abilities experience rapid value increases throughout their careers. Duran's market value and salary potential will increase if he maintains his current performance level during the upcoming three seasons.
Article Summary: Jarren duran's current contract with the boston red sox is worth $7.7 million for the 2026 mlb season. The speedy outfielder has turned into a key part of the team since his breakout season in 2024. His net worth is estimated to be in the low millions, mostly coming from his mlb salaries and performance bonuses.

Article Title: Vanessa Piunno: Who is Vanessa Piunno?: How the Vancouver-based entrepreneur is related to Auston Matthews
Article Text:
Vanessa Piunno and Auston Matthews made their relationship public in early March (Image via Instagram)

Is Auston Matthews dating entrepreneur Vanessa Piunno following his breakup with Emily Ruttledge ?





Auston Matthews is enjoying one of the biggest years of his career, after coming off a landmark performance at the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics, where Team USA won its first men's hockey gold since 1980. He finished the tournament with three goals and four assists, driving the American attack, showcasing his sheer brilliance and talent on the biggest international stage.Following his successful campaign at the Olympics, fans are now getting a glimpse of a new chapter in his personal life. The Toronto Maple Leafs captain’s new relationship with entrepreneur Vanessa Piunno has quietly gone public. Let’s take a closer look at Matthews' relationship rumor with his new partner.NHL player Auston Matthews appears to have moved on from his long-time relationship with Emily Ruttledge and is now dating Toronto-based entrepreneur and skincare specialist Vanessa Piunno . The couple made their relationship public in early March when she posted a series of photos on Instagram from the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics, showing her celebrating with Matthews after he won gold with Team USA.Speculations suggest that Piunno has been dating Matthews for quite some time, and it is evident from the pictures that she has shared recently on her social media handle.Her post showed several moments from the Olympic trip that celebrated Matthews’ historic achievement.As per reports, Piunno took to Instagram to share photos from the 2026 Winter Olympic Games in Milano Cortina. “A month to remember forever,” Piunno captioned a post that included her posing with Matthews after his gold medal win.This announcement stole the limelight, raising speculation on Matthew's separation from his former long-time girlfriend Emily Ruttledge, who was a licensed therapist. As per reports, the sportsman and Emily were in a long-distance relationship.Though nothing is known about the couple’s status, since the gold medal win, Ruttledge hasn’t shared anything on social media to congratulate Matthews, raising speculation that their relationship is over. Reports suggest Piunno is based in Toronto and runs her own skincare brand, Piunno Beauty, where she offers one-on-one trainings and courses aimed at making skincare feel “empowering, not intimidating.”Her website Piunno Beauty’s website states that she offers private one-on-one skincare training that is “personal, thoughtful, and rooted in education.” “I believe skin care should feel empowering, not intimidating, and that learning works best when it’s tailored to you,” the website states.
Article Summary: Auston matthews is dating toronto-based entrepreneur and skincare specialist vanessa piunno. The couple made their relationship public in early march when she posted a series of photos on instagram from the milano cortina 2026 winter olympics. This announcement stole the limelight, raising speculation on his separation from his former long-time girlfriend emily ruttledge.

Article Title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says ‘chose the wrong match…’, Microsoft's Satya Nadella wishes team as India win ICC Men's T20 World Cup
Article Text:
ICC Men's T20 World Cup: India make history

‘Champions!’ Narendra Modi Celebrates Team India’s Stunning ICC Men's T20 World Cup Title Win

India made history after winning back-to-back T20 World Cup titles, becoming the first country to defend its title and win it at home. Moreover, it was also the third t20 World Cup title for the ‘Men in Blue’ – most for any any country since the start of the tournament. India’s win over New Zealand not just captivated billions in India but also caught the attention of some of the biggest names in the tech world too. Both Google CEO Sundar Pichai and Microsoft chief executive Satya Nadella have congratulated the team India on winning the cup.“Congrats India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup!,” said Pichai, who was present at one of the matches during the tournament, had a light-hearted confession to make.“Chose the wrong game to go watch:) what a stadium and atmosphere.Well played to the other semi finalists, SA, Eng and Nz!! Also so exciting to see the game expand to so many countries and congrats to ICC for a great tournament!” he added.Nadella was also excited to see India win and he particularly mentioned Jasprit Bumrah and Sanju Samson for their performances throughout the tournament.“Congratulations to Team India on a fantastic T20 World Cup win 🇮🇳 Tough luck today, New Zealand. @Jaspritbumrah93, once again a match winner when it mattered most.@IamSanjuSamson, what a tournament and what an impact. Absolutely incredible,” Nadella said.India dismantled New Zealand to win the 2026 ICC Men’s T20 World Cup, becoming the first team in history to defend the title and the first to win it on home soil. The victory completes a “Triple Crown” for India, adding to their 2024 T20 World Cup and 2025 Champions Trophy trophies.New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner won the toss and chose to field. Sanju Samson (89 off 46 balls) and Abhishek Sharma (52 off 21 balls) came out swinging and never looked back. The pair put on 98 runs in just 43 balls, including a powerplay score of 92/0 — the highest powerplay total in T20 World Cup history. Soon Ishan Kishan blazed his way to 54 off just 25 balls with Shivam Dube finishing with a 26 off just 8 balls to push India's total to 255 for 5.Chasing 256, New Zealand's batting lineup crumbled against a disciplined Indian bowling attack. Jasprit Bumrah returned figures of 4 for 15; Axar Patel took three wickets, while Hardik Pandya, Varun Chakaravarthy, and Abhishek Sharma took one each.
Article Summary: India made history after winning back-to-back t20 world cup titles, becoming the first country to defend its title and win it at home. Google ceo sundar pichai and microsoft chief executive satya nadella congratulated the team india on winning the cup.

Article Title: WWE RAW Results & Highlights 9-march-2026: Bayley becomes No.1 contender, huge title match, major betrayal, and more
Article Text:
Image via WWE

No.1 Contender's Gauntlet match for the WWE Women's Intercontinental title

Penta vs. Original El Grande Americano

Oba Femi vs. Rusev





WWE Monday Night RAW aired its March 9 episode from the Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington. The show saw a huge title match for a new champion, a powerhouse clash between two stars, and a new No.1 contender crowned. Apart from that, the show also saw The Judgment Day turning on Finn Balor in a major shocker that left the audience stunned and CM Punk getting a warning shot from Roman Reigns' cousins, The Usos, despite his good relationship with them.The show opened with RAW GM Adam Pearce calling out Seth Rollins. Suddenly, a lot of masked men surrounded the ring, only for one of them to make their way and reveal himself to be Rollins.Pearce told him that what he had done to The Vision was not acceptable, but he was willing to move forward. The Vision made their entrance, but Rollins and masked men leave. Jey Uso and LA Knight appear to fight The Vision and stand tall.The match started with IYO Sky and Lyra Valkyria. Sky eliminated her with a roundhouse kick that led to Raquel Rodriguez making her way out. She hit a Tijuana Bomb on SKY on the apron, and Ivy Nile came out to roll her back in for Raquel to eliminate her.Bayley entered next and eliminated Raquel and Ivy Nile. The match came down to Bayley and Asuka. A fought effort saw The Role Model escape the Asuka Lock and deliver a Rose Plant to pick up the win. She will now face AJ Lee next week for the WWE Women's Intercontinental Championship.The new WWE Intercontinental Champion, Penta, defended his title against the 'Original' El Grande Americano in a singles match. The two masked luchadors produced a highly captivating showdown, which saw Penta retain his championship with a huge Mexican Destroyer on El Grande.The WWE Universe witnessed the first-ever clash between Oba Femi and Rusev inside the squared circle. The two behemoths had an epic collision in the match; however, Oba Femi continued to establish his dominance and picked up the win with a thunderous Sit Out Powerbomb.Also read: Meet Galina Becker: WWE megastar Roman Reigns’ wife turned fitness model with 23% net worth surge
Article Summary: Wwe monday night raw aired its march 9 episode from the climate pledge arena in seattle, washington. The show saw a huge title match for a new champion, a powerhouse clash between two stars, and a new no.1 contender crowned. The judgment day turned on finn balor in a major shocker that left the audience stunned.

Article Title: ‘Trust & faith, not hope’: Gautam Gambhir on why the team backed Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson
Article Text:
India head coach Gautam Gambhir with captain Suryakumar Yadav. (Pic credit: BCCI)

Proud families celebrate India’s World Cup heroes | SKY, Abhishek & Axar’s loved ones react





AHMEDABAD: Gautam Gambhir said he picked India’s T20 side on “trust and faith” and backed Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma despite poor form. The opening duo played important roles in the final. Maybe struggling ‘mystery spinner’ Varun Chakravarthy, who did not come good, can also be added to the list.Before the final, Abhishek had put together just 89 runs in seven matches at 12.71, including three ducks.However, the left-hander rediscovered his destructive touch in the final, smashing an 18-ball half-century, the fastest of this World Cup.Gambhir also showed faith in Samson, recalling him even though the ’keeper-batter had scored just 46 runs in a fivematch T20I series against the Kiwis a week before the World Cup.Samson hit three matchwinning half-centuries on the trot, first the 50-ball 97 not out against West Indies at the Eden Gardens in Kolkata and then knocks of 89 off 42 balls in the semis against England and 89 off 46 balls in the final.“I think you pick the team on trust and faith. You don’t pick on hope. When you pick someone on trust and faith, you don’t lose that trust and faith after four, five games,” he said.Gambhir said Samson was given a break for a few matches. “It was a tactical change,” the coach said. “The captain and I never felt Sanju was out of form. We felt that after the NZ series, he needed a break.“Sometimes, it’s good to give someone a break. You want to get away from the pressure, clear your head and come back. The talent that Sanju has and the way he was batting in the nets, there was no doubt he’d deliver.” added Gambhir.
Article Summary: Gautam gambhir says he picked india’s t20 side on ‘trust and faith’ and backed sanju samson and abhishek sharma despite poor form. Samson hit three matchwinning half-centuries on the trot, first the 50-ball 97 not out against west indies.
